name: wedding_03
description: Formal wedding invitation with ceremony and reception times

input.subject: Save the Date: Sarah & Michael's Wedding
input.body_text:
Together with their families,

Sarah Elizabeth Johnson
and
Michael David Thompson

request the pleasure of your company
at their wedding celebration

Saturday, the twenty-first of June
Two thousand and twenty-six

Ceremony: 4:00 in the afternoon
Reception to follow at 6:00 PM

Rosewood Estate
2500 Vineyard Road
Napa Valley, California 94558

Dinner and dancing until midnight

Black tie optional

Kindly respond by May 15th, 2026
RSVP online at sarahandmichael2026.com

With love,
Sarah & Michael

events.title: Sarah & Michael's Wedding
events.location: Rosewood Estate, 2500 Vineyard Road, Napa Valley, California 94558
events.description: Wedding ceremony at 4:00 PM, reception at 6:00 PM, dinner and dancing until midnight

notes: Wedding with ceremony time and 'until midnight' end - tests understanding of event spanning to next day
